channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Gretsch Round Up Bass, One of only 2 ever made Custom Shop RARE! OHC Geddy Lee 6120 — $1,850,099
item.description:
$1,850,099 · Excellent · The Classic Axe

This bass is DEAD MINT! Please check all photos they are big part of the description,. Please excuse any glare. Sometime before 2016 Geddy Lee Bassist of RUSH, who loves Gretsch Round Ups, asked Stephen Stern, Master builder of Gretsch Custom Shop, to build a Round Up bass. He delivered my basses twin to Geddy Lee in 2016 & was included in the Big Beautiful Book of Bass. This bass is made by Stephen Stern. COA signed in 2022 just before his retirement, The bass is a the missing piece to complete a Gretsch Western Collection. The bass features the Belt Buckle Tailpiece. The "G" Brand. 1 DeArmond Pickup with single volume & tone. The bass sounds great for just one pickup. One piece Tortoise pickguard with Steers Head. The full 34" Scale neck has engraved block inlays. Steers head & T Roof GRETSCH logo on headstock. The basses entire body side is Studded Tooled Leather. Back of headstock has Custom Shop decal & Stephen Stern's signature. The serial number tag, like the old ones, is in the control cavity. Comes in a very nice White Cowboy Style case with all Custom Shop tags & case key. May Trade for a Custom color 1969 Jazz Bass with matching headstock if in Exceptional Original Condition.

item.title: Alvarez AEB70ce Armrest Shadowburst Artist Elite Bass (NEW DEMO) — $773.21
item.description:
$773.21 · Brand New · Hebert Musique Inc.

  • Top WoodSolid AA Sitka Spruce
  • Back and Sides WoodRosewood
  • Top ColorShadowburst/Gloss
  • Back & Sides ColorNatural/Gloss

  • Bridge PinsPPS Synthetic Bone
  • ShapeBass
  • NeckAfrican Mahogany
  • Pick Up/EQLR Baggs hi fi
  • BracingFST2
  • BridgeBi-Level Indian Rosewood
  • InlaysMOP & Arylic
  • FingerboardEast Indian Rosewood
  • Nut and SaddleBone
  • TunerChrome Closed Gears
  • StringsD'Addario EXPPBB170
  • Neck Meets Body15th
  • Number of Frets20

DIMENSIONS

  • Overall Length (mm)1162
  • Body Width (mm)420
  • Body Depth at Heel (mm)102
  • Body Depth at Base (mm)122
  • Scale (mm)813
  • Scale (inches)32
  • Nut Width (mm)43
  • Nut Width (inches)1 11/16

item.title: Sterling RAY24 Classic - Butterscotch — $727.12
item.description:
$727.12 · Very Good · BassBros

Here we have a Sterling by MusicMan Ray 24 Classic in the classic butterscotch finish. This one is in very good condition with some signs of wear, including a small ding on the side of body and one on the back of neck at 10th fret, as well as light tarnishing to hardware. Everything is in good working order including the electronics and the trussrod.

– Part Exchange Welcome –

Serial Number – SR50042
Colour – Butterscotch
Body Finish – Gloss
Neck Finish – Satin
Neck Wood – Maple
Fretboard – Maple
Frets – 21
Scale Length – 34″
Weight – 9lb 9oz / 4.3kg
Electronics – Active 2 Band
Pickups – MM Humbucker
Gigbag/Hardcase - N/A

item.title: Alpher Mako 5 - Transparent Green — $3,184.07
item.description:
$3,184.07 · Excellent · BassBros

Now this is a looker! A fantastic Alpher Mako Short Scale 5 string in Transparent Green! Those that know, will know that Alpher are building some stunning basses, this one being no exception. If you're after something a bit different, this is definitely worth a look. We have given the bass a full checkover and everything is working perfectly, as it should. Included is the original Alpher Hiscox case.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - 192
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood  - Ash
Neck Finish - Satin
Fretboard - Ebony
Frets - 21
Scale Length - 30"
Weight - 9lb 1oz / 4.1kg
Electronics - Glockenklang 3 band
Pickups - Nordstrand
Gigbag/Hardcase - Hiscox hardcase

item.title: ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-604 FRX Signature Electric Bass Black Satin — $1,599
item.description:
$1,599 · Brand New · Studio Gears

ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-604 FRX Signature Electric Bass - Black Satin

The TA-604 FRX delivers a substantial, balanced feel in hand thanks to its neck-thru maple construction and thin U-shaped neck profile. This signature model combines professional-grade components with a refined black satin finish, designed for players who demand both precision and punch from their instrument. The 35" scale and aggressive active electronics make this bass equally suited to heavy styles and dynamic studio work.

Playability & Build

The 3-piece maple neck with rosewood fingerboard and 24 extra-jumbo frets offers fast action and clear articulation across the entire range. A 15.75" radius fingerboard maintains comfort during extended sessions, while the 40mm nut width provides definition between strings without sacrificing approachability. The neck-thru construction ensures solid sustain and resonance from bridge to headstock.

Tone & Electronics

Twin EMG 35DC active pickups deliver tight, punchy lows and articulate mids with minimal noise—ideal for modern bass playing. The active electronics layout includes dedicated volume, balance, and tone controls, granting precise shaping of your signal before it hits the amplifier. Coupled with the LTD BB-604 bridge and Grover tuners, this bass maintains pitch stability and tonal clarity in any setting.

Key Features
  • Maple body with neck-thru construction for superior sustain
  • 3-piece maple neck with thin U-shaped profile
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • 15.75" fingerboard radius for ergonomic comfort
  • 40mm molded nut width
  • Slayer pentagram fingerboard inlays
  • Dual EMG 35DC active pickups
  • Volume, balance, and tone control layout
  • 35" scale length
  • LTD BB-604 bridge
  • Black hardware throughout
  • Black satin finish with included hardshell case

This is a purpose-built instrument that combines signature-series credibility with the active tone-shaping tools and rock-solid construction serious players expect.

item.title: Cort Jeff Berlin Series Rithimic V 2022 - Natural — $955.64
item.description:
$955.64 · Excellent · BassBros

The bass features an alder body with a beautiful exotic wood top. Outfitting the body are a pair of Bartolini Jeff Berlin custom soapbar pickups, a Babicz Full Contact Hardware bridge, one volume control, one balance control, one tone control, passive electronics, and gold hardware. The hard rock maple neck is complemented with a rosewood fingerboard and four inline headstock featuring Hipshot Ultralite tuners.

What Jeff Berlin has to say – “After playing the same bass for so many years I was not sure that another builder could develop something that I would love. As soon as I played the very first Cort Rithimic bass, I was wowed. I could not believe how perfectly this bass turned out. This is an astonishing instrument that Cort has built for me.”

This bass is in excellent condition with light signs of use and wear. Everything is in good working order including the electronics and the trussrod.

– Part Exchange Welcome –

Serial Number – IE220500391
Colour – Natural
Body Finish – Gloss
Body Wood  – Alder with Spalted Maple & Padauk top
Neck Finish – Satin
Neck Wood – Maple
Fretboard – Ebony
Frets – 21
Scale Length – 34″
Weight – 8lb 13oz / 4.0kg
Electronics – 1 Volume, 1 Balance, 1 Tone Passive Electronics
Pickups – Bartolini® Jeff Berlin Custom Soapbar
Gigbag/Hardcase – N/A

item.title: Sterling SUB StingRay Ray4HH 2024 - Present - Chopper Blue — $399
item.description:
$399 · Excellent · Jack & Marcus Gear Closet

Very good overall condition with only light signs of normal use. Everything works exactly as it should.

Freshly maintained with a complete setup, new Ernie Ball 50–105 strings, polished frets, conditioned fretboard, and a thorough cleaning. Plays great with comfortable action and sounds fantastic.

item.title: Edwards ESP EG-90B 90s Gisho Signature Made in Japan Black — $855.90
item.description:
$855.90 · Very Good · Michał's Gear Outlet

Edwards EG-90B for sale – the signature model of Gisho, the long-time bassist of the J-rock band Penicillin, which sold millions of albums back in the '90s. Edwards, a highly regarded branch of the ESP guitar group, created this instrument strictly to the musician's specifications exclusively for the Japanese market, making this model a rare find around here.


The construction is based on an alder body and a stable, 3-piece maple neck. The neck features a very comfortable, almost satin finish, with 24 frets laid into a nice rosewood fingerboard. A huge advantage here is the ergonomics – the bass weighs just 3.7 kg, suffers from absolutely no neck dive, and provides great access to every single note.


The electronics are 100% original, featuring a passive setup in a unique configuration: a reversed P-style pickup at the neck and a bridge humbucker with coil-splitting capabilities. You get a vol/vol/tone/tone control layout, which translates into vast tonal possibilities. In a mix, the bass sounds punchy, metallic, and with a natural rock aggression, while running solely on the precision pickup makes the low-end deep and quite fat.


I'd rate the visual condition as really good for a nearly 30-year-old instrument. The black finish has only a few shallow scratches on the front, while the back of the body picked up some larger blemishes, mostly from a belt buckle. The factory black hardware is in great shape, and the tuners turn smoothly and hold tune reliably. Mechanically, the instrument is fully ready to play: the truss rod operates smoothly, the frets are in excellent condition, and the current string action at the 12th fret is a comfortable 2 mm. The bass plays easily and doesn't buzz anywhere on the neck.


Can be tested in Poznań, Poland, or shipped securely. No trades. Private sale.

item.title: Jackson Pro Series Adam Blackstone Signature "Gladys" Concert Bass 2024 - Present - Black Stone — $799.99
item.description:
$799.99 · Excellent · Pirate Sam's Custom Art Guitars

Jackson Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone "Gladys" Concert 5-string Bass Guitar - Black Stone -

$949.99 retail

BLOW OUT PRICED only $799.99 and you get a one off custom art bass ! Part of my Cheeseburger in Paradise series -- I call this one :

"Paradise V "

This one has been turned into a custom art bass by Pirate Sam ( Sam McCready ) Original finish was sanded down to the bare wood then the graphics were inked in followed by a few light coats of clear semi gloss paint to protect the graphics when playing it !


This is a BRAND NEW - mint condition overstock bass that Fender sold to the MIRC corp where it was inspected and set up for sale to MIRC dealers .

They weighs in at around lbs oz -

Writer, producer, and musical director extraordinaire Adam Blackstone has spent over two decades backing some of the biggest names in the music business, with a musical résumé that lists the likes of Nicki Minaj, Justin Timberlake, Eminem, and countless others. The Jackson Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone “Gladys” Concert bass guitar — lovingly named after Adam’s grandmother — encapsulates his diverse musical talents in a single high-performance 5-string. Starting with a lightweight poplar body paired with a graphite-reinforced maple neck, this bass offers exquisite playability thanks to its 21 jumbo frets and compound-radius maple fingerboard. A pair of Jackson BBE J-style pickups grant both warm, jazzy thump and biting grit, bolstered by a flexible 3-band active EQ. It’s all bookended with a top-shelf hardware combo consisting of a HiMass bridge and old-school open-back tuners. Representing the very best of 5-string versatility and performance, the Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone “Gladys” Concert bass is a true workhorse ready to excel in any stage or studio application you could ever dream of.

item.title: Yamaha BBN5-LII Late 1990s - Excellent — $475
item.description:
$475 · Very Good · Max's Gear Depot

YAMAHA BBN5-LII with new strings. Plays wonderfully.

item.title: Squier Contemporary Active Jazz Bass V HH Black 5-String | Active Electronics | SQR Pickups | Hard Case — $390
item.description:
$390 · Very Good · Toxic

Up for sale is a Squier Contemporary Active Jazz Bass V HH 5-String in a sleek Gloss Black finish. This bass has been fully tested and is 100% functional, delivering the powerful, modern tone the Contemporary series is known for. Equipped with dual Squier SQR humbucking pickups and active electronics, it offers plenty of punch, clarity, and versatility for virtually any genre.

The bass is in very good overall condition. It shows minor surface scratches from normal use and has one small cosmetic ding, but nothing that affects playability or performance. The neck is straight, the frets have minimal wear, and the electronics operate exactly as they should. It has been set up to play comfortably with smooth action across the fretboard.

A hard shell case is included, providing excellent protection for storage and transport.

Features

5-string bass

Gloss Black finish

Maple neck with maple fingerboard

Dual Squier SQR humbucking pickups

Active electronics

Individual adjustable bridge saddles

Chrome hardware

Hard shell case included

Condition

Fully tested and working perfectly

Straight neck action is perfect

Frets in excellent condition

Minor surface scratches from normal use

One small cosmetic ding (see photos)

Electronics function flawlessly

Overall Very Good cosmetic condition

This is an excellent modern 5-string bass that's ready for the stage, studio, or practice room. The included hard case makes it an even better value.

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description. Feel free to reach out with any questions before purchasing

item.title: Framus Star Bass Husk (1960s - Redburst) — $175
item.description:
$175 · Non Functioning · Jack's Guitarcheology

We have this vintage Framus Star bass husk at the workshop currently. It'd be a great mod project for someobdy wanting to put in the work!

Got questions? Shoot me a message, I love nerding out with other gearheads!

item.title: Fender Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Signature Mustang Bass 2025 - Faded Daphne Blue w/ Novak pickup — $1,449
item.description:
$1,449 · Excellent · The Gear Shelf

You know them, you love them. This is the best-feeling JMJ I’ve personally played, and I’ve played (and owned) several. This bass has been upgraded with the Curtis Novak Fat Mustang pickup, which offers a “wider tone band, higher fidelity, more body and less mids than a standard Mustang Bass pickup,” according to Novak’s site. The electronics have also been upgraded to a Starr Guitar Systems wiring harness featuring CTS 250k pots, a Switchcraft jack, & Orange Drop Cap. New La Bella 760F-MUS Mustang flatwound strings. A previous owner also added glow in the dark side dots (3rd fret one has chipped off a small amount, but still does its job). Ships in a basic gig bag.

item.title: Fender Fullerton Precision Bass Uke, Walnut Fingerboard, Tortoiseshell Pickguard - Olympic White — $359.99
item.description:
$359.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

A celebration of Fender's pioneering electric bass design in a refreshingly fun size, the Fullerton Precision Bass® ukulele is nothing short of electric. Uniquely portable and performance-ready, the Precision Bass ukulele features an approachable 20.25" scale length, compact proportions and surprising lightness, making it remarkably easy to pick up and impossible to put down. With a built-in tuner for on-the-fly adjustment and intuitive controls for volume and tone, the on-board preamp packs an articulate low-end and big tonal personality that punches far above its weight. Offered in classic Fender colors with a signature Precision Bass pickguard and headstock shape, this bass is ready to lay the foundation for any player at any stage.

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass Laurel Fingerboard, White Pickguard - Olympic White — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender® Standard Jazz Bass® delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a set of Fender Standard pickups for high-output sonic character and an inviting Modern C-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this J Bass® truly sets the standard for the Fender experience.

  • Poplar body with gloss finish
  • Fender Standard ceramic single-coil J Bass pickups
  • 4-saddle bridge with satin chrome saddles
  • Modern C-shaped maple neck with satin finish
  • 9.5"-radius fingerboard

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass Maple Fingerboard, White Pickguard - Candy Cola — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender® Standard Precision Bass® delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a Fender Standard pickup for versatile iconic tone and an inviting Modern C-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this P Bass® truly sets the standard for the Fender experience.

  • Poplar body with gloss finish
  • Fender Standard ceramic split single-coil P Bass pickup
  • 4-saddle bridge with satin chrome saddles
  • Modern C-shaped maple neck with satin finish
  • 9.5"-radius fingerboard

item.title: Fender Vintera III Late '60s Precision Bass Rosewood Fingerboard - Firemist Gold — $1,249.99
item.description:
$1,249.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

The Fender® Vintera III series delivers meticulously crafted vintage recreations that capture the authentic look, feel, and tone of iconic Fender guitars from the '50s, '60s, and '70s.

The Vintera® III Late '60s Precision Bass® features an alder body and maple neck with rosewood fingerboard for classic Fender tone that's full of punch and clarity. The late '60s "C"-shape maple neck with 7.25" radius maple or rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. At its heart, you'll find a vintage-style late '60s split-coil pickup that delivers all the punchy and powerful, warm and woody tone that made Fender® famous. Other features include a vintage-style 4-saddle bridge for rock-solid intonation and sustain, and vintage-style lollipop tuning machines for enhanced tuning stability.

Embrace the authentic vintage spirit and legendary sound of Vintera® III where every detail tells the story.

item.title: Fender Vintera III Late '60s Precision Bass Maple Fingerboard - Lake Placid Blue — $1,249.99
item.description:
$1,249.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

The Fender® Vintera III series delivers meticulously crafted vintage recreations that capture the authentic look, feel, and tone of iconic Fender guitars from the '50s, '60s, and '70s.

The Vintera® III Late '60s Precision Bass® features an alder body and maple neck with rosewood fingerboard for classic Fender tone that's full of punch and clarity. The late '60s "C"-shape maple neck with 7.25" radius maple or rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. At its heart, you'll find a vintage-style late '60s split-coil pickup that delivers all the punchy and powerful, warm and woody tone that made Fender® famous. Other features include a vintage-style 4-saddle bridge for rock-solid intonation and sustain, and vintage-style lollipop tuning machines for enhanced tuning stability.

Embrace the authentic vintage spirit and legendary sound of Vintera® III where every detail tells the story.

item.title: Roscoe SKB Custom 5 Fretless Diamondwood Wenge Bubinga OHSC — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Rwider

Bass and OHSC are in like new condition

Specifics:
- Mahogany Body
- Exhibition Grade Bees Wing Bubinga
- 3 Piece Maple/Wenge/Maple Neck
- Black diamondwood (lined) fingerboard [new supply is dwindling]
- 24 Positions
- 35" Scale
- 19mm String Spacing
- Bartolini Pickups and 3 Band Pre-amp w/ Dual Mids (push-pull)

item.title: G&L L1000 1980 READ DESCRIPTION — $799.99
item.description:
$799.99 · Fair · Nils's Shop

Sold as is no refunds or returns of any type. Read the description carefully . The price is firm not interested in offers or trades.

This is currently set up with brand new strings, action is 7/64th of an inch at the 12th fret low E, 6/64 of an inch at the 12th fret high E. The electronics function and this does play but it has a few issues. There has been a repair by the control plate on the side shown in the picture, some of the electronics are not original but function. The main issue is the neck bows up around the first three or four frets. This is not able to be addressed by the Truss rod. It does play now but there's some buzzing around the 3rd to 7th fret on the low side especially. Plugged into an amplifier with a band you probably wouldn't notice it but it is definitely there and if you're in the studio or playing it unplugged. For this to play perfectly would have to pull out some frets and make the fretboard level in that area and put them back, or maybe you could just file the frets to compensate.

Pick up alone sells all day for over $200, and the loaded body or parts alone would bring the asking price. A good condition working one of these is $1,500 all day.

Selling as is no returns or refunds of any type. This includes the TKL gig bag shown

item.title: Status Precision/Musicman Bass - Premium Parts — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Excellent · Ben's Bass Shop

Super killer Status P Bass/Musicman hybrid bass up for grabs here.

I picked this up recently since I fell in love with the look, but this move is kicking my ass and I need to sell some gear to recoup expenses and limit the amount of gear I am moving. 

- Status full graphite P bass neck, P Bass nut width
- Warmoth Solid Black Limba P Bass Body
- Turner Pickups Gordo Solo single coil Pickup
- John East MMSR 2 Band EQ Preamp
- Fender American Deluxe Bridge
- Gotoh Reverse Tuners
- Will come in a Mono Gig Bag
- 9lbs 6oz

One small blemish I found on the back of the headstock, otherwise basically mint.

item.title: Music Man - Ernie Ball Pino Palladino ICON 2025 - Collector grade — $13,689.64
item.description:
$13,689.64 · Excellent · Fabrizio's Gear Bazaar

ICON" – #8 of 15 Worldwide – New Old Stock / Unplayed

Offered for sale is an extraordinarily rare Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Fretless "Pino Palladino ICON", serial number 8 of only 15 instruments produced worldwide.

This is a true collector's piece, presented in New Old Stock (NOS) condition. The bass has never been played, never gigged, and has remained carefully preserved in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase.

Its condition is exactly what discerning collectors hope to find: 100% original, flawless, and museum-quality, with no scratches, dents, finish checking, or signs of handling.

Included with the instrument are:

  • Original Ernie Ball Music Man hardshell case
  • Complete original case candy and accessories
  • Certificate of Authenticity
  • Original purchase invoice
  • Import documentation

The Pino Palladino ICON is among the rarest modern Music Man instruments ever released, produced in an extremely limited run of only 15 examples worldwide. Opportunities to acquire one in untouched, unplayed condition are exceptionally uncommon.

Whether destined for a world-class collection or for the player seeking the ultimate expression of the iconic fretless StingRay, this instrument represents an investment-grade example that is unlikely to become available again anytime soon.

The bass will be professionally packed, fully insured, and shipped worldwide. Additional high-resolution photographs and any specific information are available upon request.

Serious inquiries only.

item.title: Charvel 3B 1986 - Red — $699
item.description:
$699 · Good · Ben's Bass Shop

Here is a killer 86 Charvel 3B up fro grabs. I have rebuilt this one from and finally have it in good playing shape. Original pickups, bridge and electronics are long gone.

- Made in Japan
- 34" Neck Through
- Rosewood Fretbaord
- Original Tuners
- EMG Frank Bello Signature Pickups
- VVT Controls
- Wilkinson Bridge with brass saddles
- Approx 9lbs
- Comes in a quality gig bag

Bass is well played, has many blemishes and scars. This is a players bass, not a collector.

DOES NOT COME WITH ORIGINAL PARTS

item.title: Fender Bass VI (Squier Classic Vibe modified) Beatlesque Fender Bass VI — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · thecat1963

Bought this a few years ago when they came out 2018?, Squier Vintage Vibe or Classic vibe. Low play time, nice clean condition, home played, never gigged and well taken care of with no major dings. Just typical wear from being played. I'll clean and polish it up. Comes with a roadrunner gig bag and includes the truss rod adjustment hex thingy, whammy bar. Minimal playtime since the guitar was not used on tons of Beatles songs (plus I haven't learned all of them anyways LOL)
UPGRADES:

  • Pickguard covered with copper, non-conductive adhesive
  • interior routing lined with copper, non-conductive adhesive
  • Installed Fralin Bass VI pickups ($421 value)
  • replaced 4 switches with Fender switches
  • both pots USA CTS pots, modified the control plate to fit
  • all new wiring, cloth wiring
  • New switchcraft jack

Plays great, the hum has been great mitigated with the copper covering.
Selling because I recently received a New Fender Vintera III Bass VI (eventually I'll upgrade the neck with block inlays and sell the neck) be on the lQQk out in the next few months if you're looking for a Fender Bass VI neck with clay dots.
I play Beatles, so I replaced the Squier logo with a Fender decal to complete the look of the ones the Beatles had. I'm pretty sure theirs would have been between 1965-1967 model, since in 1968 the logo changed to a black lettering style.
The only thing I didn't replace is the tremelo.
So if you're looking for a Fender Bass VI that looks like what the Beatles had, this is a great buy, with great sound and only minimum left to do.
Please note: Ask questions, if you need more pictures just ask. Sold as-is NO RETURNS. If you're interested you're interested. I'm not interested with buyer's remorse and returns..... NO GAMES please.

SHIPPING TO CONTINENTAL U.S. please East Coast to West Coast only (no Hawaii, or Canada)

NOTE: THIS LISTING IS ALSO ON ANOTHER SERVICE AND COULD BE SOLD BEFORE THIS LISTING IS REMOVED.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified '70s Jazz Bass 2007 - 2017 - Natural — $300
item.description:
$300 · Very Good · Gold Tone Workshop

Squier Vintage Modified 70's Jazz Bass in VG+ condition

Every time I look at this bass I hear Carl from Aqua Teen Hunger Force doing an acapella rendition of "Tom Sawyer"

This thing looks great and sounds better.

item.title: Fender HM Bass IV - Black - Fully Upgraded — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Ben's Bass Shop

Here is a super cool, and fully upgraded Fender Japan HM IV bass up for grabs. All upgrades were done by previous owner.

Minor paint chips and wear, bass is approx 35 years old, still looks amazing.

- 34” Scale

- Made in Japan
- Jazz style thin neck.
- Dinky style body
- 3 EMG Jazz pickups
- VTVT controls with 3 Way Selector
- Hipshot Lollipop Tuners with Extender
- Gotoh Black Bass bridge.
- Gator Hard Case
- Approx 8lbs


Do not hesitate to reach out with questions

item.title: Hofner HCT 500/1-BK Beatle Bass Guitar Contemporary Great Vintage UK Vibe Black & Hard Shell Case — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Brand New · Barry Clark Music

HOFNER  HCT500/1 BLACK BEATLE BASS GUITAR.. INCLUDES A HARD SHELL CASE

Recreating the style of the 1964 version, it features a sustain block inside the body to give modern, deep-resonating bass sounds while still retaining the original Hofner Beatles bass sound.With a short scale of 30″ and the small violin bass body it is one of greatest electric bass guitars ever made. 

Pickguard and Control plate are Yellowed Pearl like the German ones

Specifications

* laminate Spruce top (like the originals)
* laminate FLAME Maple Body (like the originals)
* internal sustain block to increase feedback rejection
* fingerboard with 22 frets.
* Original Höfner HS11B ‘Staple-Top’ pick-ups.
* 76 mm short scale length.
* 42 mm saddle width.
* Nickel plated hardware.
* Vintage vibe Hofner control panel with 2 volume controls & Tea Cup Knobs
2 circuit breakers, Rhythm/Solo switches for volume Boost.
* Black finish.
Strings are Hofner Round Wound
Color is High Gloss Black

This violin-shaped model is commonly referred to as the "Beatle bass."

With authentic details inspired by the original, the Hofner  Vintage Style Bass makes the legendary violin bass available to the rest of us.

Don't get the idea that this a just a "nowhere man" look-alike. This quality instrument features a spruce top and beautiful flamed maple back and sides.

The semi-hollow body and set neck will give you the warm, round tone you expect from the violin bass.  

A Hofner Hard Shell Case is Included

Guitar is set up and ready to play;
If you would like more information contact us through the item.
Thank You
Barry Clark Music

Tomah WI

item.title: Brand New Rickenbacker 4003W Walnut 2026 — $3,450.98
item.description:
$3,450.98 · Excellent · Julito's Gear Depot

Selling a Brand New Rickenbacker 4003 Walnut 2026 with original hard case and case candy , this is not a used or a second hand bass in mint condition , this is a absolutely brand new never used , obviously in mint condition .

I m selling and shipping from Spain to all around European Union by 50 euros , so there is not any kind of extra import taxes involved ... is not the same if you buy to US and order to ship it to EU.... get ready to pay a lot more in European customs ....

item.title: Encore E83 P Bass - 1980's - Red - Sunn Mustang FMIC Factory - New Strings - — $186.97
item.description:
$186.97 · Fair · JimmyBaye

This bass has signs of wear as pictured, mainly chips, scuffs and scratches to the body finish, a chip to headstock. The neck is very nice, fretboard and frets in good condition for a 40 year old bass. The electronics have been serviced, the fretboard has been conditioned, a great player now.

These were made in the Sunn Mustang factory then owned by Fender (FMIC) so the quality is very good for what was a budget bass at the time. The body has a good solid weight to it, the headstock of these older models is the traditional fender shaped carve.

The tuners are solid and the pickups sound decent similar to what you would expect from a P style bass. These older instruments do have wear and this one is no exception although only aesthetic though which adds to the mojo. The bass will come set up with new strings.

Any questions please ask, will be packaged carefully and sent by courier.

item.title: Epiphone EB232 Rivoli 1967 - Sunburst — $2,999
item.description:
$2,999 · Very Good · The Bass Shop

Product details:

This is definitely one of the cleanest Rivoli basses we've seen. All aspects work perfectly, the neck is totally straight with lots of fret life, and the only blemish is a small ding on the back of the neck toward the bottom.  The string mute works great, however, the original padding is getting a little old. The tuners were supposedly changed out in the late '60s. 

WEIGHT:  8 lbs. 15 ozs.    

SERIAL #:   841660

DATE:  1967

NUT WIDTH:  1 1/2"    

SCALE:  30.5"

COLOR:  Sunburst

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Maple/ Maple/ Rosewood  

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Gibson Sidewinder Humbucker / Passive Vol. Tone, Tone Selector Switch    

CONDITION:  Very Good   

CASE:  Era Correct Gibson Hardshell Case (Black Tolex, Purple Interior)

item.title: Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR5A250 Electric Bass Guitar - 5-String — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Big Apple Music

With its commanding voice and striking stage presence, the Ibanez Premium SR5A250 stands as a high-performance salute to the bold American spirit. Marking the 250th anniversary of the United States, this limited-edition 5-string bass pairs a red, white and blue finish with the high-end craftsmanship of the Ibanez Premium line. Beneath the commemorative design is a precision-built instrument, featuring an African mahogany body and a five-piece panga panga and purpleheart neck reinforced with KTS titanium rods for exceptional stability and sustain. Nordstrand Big Break pickups deliver a powerful, articulate voice, while the active three-band EQ, EQ bypass and three-way mid frequency switch provide a wide, highly controllable tonal range. It’s a modern SR built for clarity, control and consistency—all wrapped in a striking, celebratory finish that pays homage to a historic milestone.

African Mahogany Body for Warmth and Sustain

The SR5A250 features an African mahogany body that delivers a balanced tonal foundation with warmth, clarity and strong sustain. Its naturally resonant character supports a wide dynamic range, keeping low-end response full without becoming muddy and allowing higher frequencies to remain defined. The SR body shape is contoured for comfort and balance, sitting naturally against the player for extended sessions while maintaining a lightweight feel that doesn’t sacrifice tonal presence.

Titanium-Reinforced Atlas Neck for Stability and Fast Playability

A five-piece panga panga and purpleheart Atlas neck provides a stable, responsive platform designed for precision playing. Reinforced with KTS titanium rods, it resists movement over time while enhancing sustain and note clarity. The slim SR profile allows for fast, fluid movement across the extended range, while the bound panga panga fingerboard adds a tight, focused attack with clear note separation. Ibanez’s premium fret edge treatment ensures a smooth, comfortable feel, making every session effortless.

Nordstrand Pickups and Advanced EQ for Precise Tone Control

Nordstrand Big Break pickups pack a split-coil design inside a soapbar format, delivering a full, punchy low end with the clarity and articulation typically associated with single-coil tones—without added noise. This gives you a strong, defined foundation that holds together across styles. The Ibanez Custom three-band EQ provides straightforward control over bass, mid and treble, while the three-way mid frequency switch lets you dial in the exact midrange character you need. An EQ bypass switch enables passive operation, offering a more traditional response when desired. Together, these features create a versatile, highly controllable tonal platform for both stage and studio use.

Performance Hardware with Limited-Edition Styling

The MR5S bridge allows for precise intonation adjustments and flexible string spacing, giving players control over feel and setup. Gotoh machine heads provide smooth, reliable tuning stability, while a Graph Tech black TUSQ XL nut helps maintain consistent performance under demanding conditions. The limited-edition red, white and blue finish, paired with a matching headstock and acrylic block inlays, completes the commemorative design with bold, unmistakable presence.

A Premium 5-String Bass Built to Celebrate 250 Years of the USA

The SR5A250 5-string bass combines refined craftsmanship with high-end performance in a limited-edition instrument designed to celebrate 250 years of the United States. With its rock-solid construction, flexible electronics and unmistakable visual identity, the Ibanez Premium SR4A250 a striking, collector-grade bass that’s built to be played.

Features
  • Limited-edition 5-string bass celebrates the 250th anniversary of the United States
  • Bold red, white and blue finish with matching headstock delivers bold, celebratory style
  • African mahogany body provides warmth, clarity and strong sustain
  • 5-piece panga panga/purpleheart Atlas neck enhances stability and resonance
  • KTS titanium rods reinforce neck strength and improve sustain
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard provides tight lows and articulate attack
  • 24 medium frets with premium fret edge treatment ensures smooth playability
  • Nordstrand Big Break split-coil pickups deliver punchy, articulate tone
  • Ibanez Custom 3-band EQ, 3-way mid frequency switch and EQ bypass switch ensure total tonal control
  • MR5S bridge allows adjustable string spacing and accurate intonation
  • Gotoh tuners and Graph Tech black TUSQ XL nut ensure tuning stability
  • Gig bag included for secure transport to gigs and studio sessions

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003SW 2024 - Walnut — $1,900
item.description:
$1,900 · Excellent · Bob's Gear Outlet

2024 Rickenbacker 4003SW Walnut bass. Mint condition. Excellent action. Played 3 times. Always stored in case. Comes with original like new case. $1900.00 plus $85.00 shipping to the continental 48 states. Free local pickup.

item.title: Fender Flea Artist Series Road Worn Signature Jazz Bass - Shell Pink 2023 — $1,427.29
item.description:
$1,427.29 · Excellent · Tritone Music

The Fender Flea Jazz Bass is a tribute to the legendary 1961 Jazz Bass played by Red Hot Chili Peppers bassist Flea. Featuring a Road Worn Faded Shell Pink nitrocellulose finish, an alder body, a maple neck with a comfortable "C"-shaped profile, and a rosewood fingerboard, it combines an authentic vintage aesthetic with the classic specifications of an early Jazz Bass. It is equipped with two Pure Vintage '64 Jazz Bass single-coil pickups and a custom neck plate featuring engraved artwork by Flea.

Condition: Used – Excellent

Included: Fender Deluxe Gig Bag

All pre-owned instruments are:

✓ Carefully inspected and tested
✓ Thoroughly cleaned
✓ Professionally set up before sale


Specs:

General
Direction: Right-handed
Number of Strings: 4
Weight: 4063g
Country of Manufacture: Mexico
Year of Manufacture: 2023
Gigbag: Original Fender Deluxe Gigbag included

Body
Material: Alder
Shape: Jazz Bass
Colour: Shell Pink
Finish: Road Worn® Nitrocellulose Lacquer
Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell

Neck
Neck Joint: Bolt-On w/ Special Flea Neckplate
Material: Maple
Profile: C-Shape
Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
Fingerboard Radius: 7,25" / 184 mm
Number of Frets / Type: 20 / Vintage-Style
Scale length: 34" / 864 mm
Nut Width / Type: 38mm / Synthetic Bone
Inlays: Aged White Dots

Electronics
Pickup-Configuration: S-S
Middle-Pickup: Pure Vintage '64 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
Bridge-Pickup: Pure Vintage '64 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
Controls: Stacked Concentric Controls Volume 1. (Neck Pickup), Tone 1. (Neck Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Tone 2. (Bridge Pickup)

Hardware
Tuners: Fender Vintage-Style / Nickel
Bridge: 4-Saddle Vintage-Style / Nickel

item.title: Fender Custom Shop 70th Anniversary 1951 Precision Bass Masterbuilt Andy Hicks Faded Aged Shell Pink — $8,450
item.description:
$8,450 · Brand New · The Music Zoo

This special bass is a Fender Custom Shop 70th Anniversary P-Bass Masterbuilt by the talented Andy Hicks! The finish on this one is Faded Aged Shell Pink, a very subtle departure from the usual blonde finishes you see on a '51 Precision. There's a rock-solid quartersawn AAA-grade birdseye maple neck with a vintage-accurate fret size and 7.25" radius. For the pickups, a Josefina Campos handwound '55 single-coil pickup and for more vintage accuracy and tone there are phonolic saddles on the bridge (undernear the bridge cover, of course!). Pick up this one of a kind bass at The Music Zoo now!
  • Solidbody Electric Bass
  • Faded Aged Shell Pink Finish
  • Slab Ash Body 
  • Quartersawn AAA-Grade Birdseye Maple Neck with '51 “U” Shape
  • 34" Scale Length 
  • 1.7" Nut Width 
  • 7.25" Fretboard Radius
  • 20 Vintage Upgrade Frets 
  • Josefina Handwound '55 P-Bass Pickup
  • Open-Gear Tuners
  • Phenolic Bridge Saddles
  • Nickel/Chrome Hardware
  • 9 lbs, 2 oz.
  • .960" Neck Thickness at 1st Fret
  • 1.010" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes: Hardshell Case, Certificate of Authenticity, Hang Tags and Paperwork

item.title: 1980 Vantage Bass VS600B Bass — $499
item.description:
$499 · Good · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage 1980 Vantage VS600B four-string bass built in Japan. The bass is in overall very good shape with dents and dings around the body, and a modern replaced bridge. It is recently set up and plays as it should, and there's a gigbag included.
  • Solidbody Electric Bass
  • Bolt-On Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fretboard
  • 40mm Nut Width
  • 9 lbs, 12 oz.
  • .840" Neck Thickness at 1st Fret
  • .940" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes Gigbag

item.title: Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR4A250 Electric Bass Guitar — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Brand New · Big Apple Music

With its commanding voice and striking stage presence, the Ibanez Premium SR4A250 stands as a high-performance salute to the bold American spirit. Marking the 250th anniversary of the United States, this limited-edition SR pairs a red, white and blue finish with the high-end craftsmanship of the Ibanez Premium line. Beneath the commemorative design is a precision-built instrument, featuring an African mahogany body and a five-piece panga panga and purpleheart neck reinforced with KTS titanium rods for exceptional stability and sustain. Nordstrand Big Break pickups deliver a powerful, articulate voice, while the active three-band EQ, EQ bypass and three-way mid frequency switch provide a wide, highly controllable tonal range. It’s a modern SR built for clarity, control and consistency—all wrapped in a striking, celebratory finish that pays homage to a historic milestone.

African Mahogany Body for Warmth and Sustain

The SR4A250 features an African mahogany body that delivers a balanced tonal foundation with warmth, clarity and strong sustain. Its naturally resonant character supports a wide dynamic range, keeping low-end response full without becoming muddy and allowing higher frequencies to remain defined. The SR body shape is contoured for comfort and balance, sitting naturally against the player for extended sessions while maintaining a lightweight feel that doesn’t sacrifice tonal presence.

Titanium-Reinforced Atlas Neck for Stability and Playability

A five-piece panga panga and purpleheart Atlas neck provides a stable, responsive platform designed for precision playing. Reinforced with KTS titanium rods, it resists movement over time while enhancing sustain and note clarity. The slim SR profile allows for fast, fluid movement across all 24 frets, while the bound panga panga fingerboard adds a tight, focused attack with clear note separation. Ibanez’s premium fret edge treatment ensures a smooth, comfortable feel, making extended playing sessions effortless.

Nordstrand Pickups and Advanced EQ for Precise Tone Control

Nordstrand Big Break pickups pack a split-coil design inside a soapbar format, delivering a full, punchy low end with the clarity and articulation typically associated with single-coil tones—without added noise. This gives you a strong, defined foundation that holds together across styles. The Ibanez Custom three-band EQ provides straightforward control over bass, mid and treble, while the three-way mid frequency switch lets you dial in the exact midrange character you need. An EQ bypass switch enables passive operation, offering a more traditional response when desired. Together, these features create a versatile, highly controllable tonal platform for both stage and studio use.

Performance Hardware with Limited-Edition Styling

The MR5S bridge allows for precise intonation adjustments and flexible string spacing, giving players control over feel and setup. Gotoh machine heads provide smooth, reliable tuning stability, while a Graph Tech black TUSQ XL nut helps maintain consistent performance under demanding conditions. The limited-edition red, white and blue finish, paired with a matching headstock and acrylic block inlays, completes the commemorative design with bold, unmistakable presence.

A Premium SR Built to Celebrate 250 Years of the USA

The SR4A250 combines refined craftsmanship with high-end performance in a limited-edition instrument designed to celebrate 250 years of the United States. With its rock-solid construction, flexible electronics and unmistakable visual identity, the Ibanez Premium SR4A250 is a striking, collector-grade bass that’s built to be played.

  • Limited-edition SR bass celebrates the 250th anniversary of the United States
  • Bold red, white and blue finish with matching headstock delivers bold, celebratory style
  • African mahogany body provides warmth, clarity and strong sustain
  • 5-piece panga panga/purpleheart Atlas neck enhances stability and resonance
  • KTS titanium rods reinforce neck strength and improve sustain
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard provides tight lows and articulate attack
  • 24 medium frets with premium fret edge treatment ensures smooth playability
  • Nordstrand Big Break split-coil pickups deliver punchy, articulate tone
  • Ibanez Custom 3-band EQ, 3-way mid frequency switch and EQ bypass switch ensure total tonal control
  • MR5S bridge allows adjustable string spacing and accurate intonation
  • Gotoh tuners and Graph Tech black TUSQ XL nut ensure tuning stability
  • Gig bag included for secure transport to gigs and studio sessions

item.title: 1983 Aria Pro II TSB-400 Bass — $599
item.description:
$599 · Fair · The Music Zoo

Sold in as-is condition, this is a fair shape 1983 Aria Pro II TSB-400 bass. The nut is super low, which causes the A string to buzz and fret out - there's some relief in the neck to let most of the notes ring out. The action is at 3mm at the low string to 2.5mm at the high string. There are dents and dings around the body and a gigbag is included.
  • Solidbody Electric Bass
  • Bolt-On Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fretboard
  • 45mm Nut Width
  • 9 lbs, 8 oz.
  • .850" Neck Thickness at 1st Fret
  • .890" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes Gigbag

item.description:
$450 · Very Good · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage 1980 Aria Pro II TSB-350 four-string bass in black. The body has a maple core with a bolt-on maple neck giving the look of a neck-thru instrument. There's dents and dings around the body, nothing which would affect playability! A gigbag is included.

  • Maple Body Core
  • Bolt-On Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fretboard

  • 9 lbs, 9 oz.

  • .940" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes Gigbag

item.title: 1984 Aria Pro II CSB-380 Bass Black — $499
item.description:
$499 · Very Good · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage Aria Pro II CSB-380 four-string bass in Black. Built in Japan in 1984, the bass has a bolt-on maple neck with a rosewood board and a slightly shorter 32.5" scale length. There's pick scratching, dents and dings around the body. The tone knob is still scratchy even after multiple cleanings. A gigbag is included.

item.title: 1980 Aria Pro II RSB-800 Bass Natural — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Excellent · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage 1980 Aria Pro II RSB-800 four-string bass built in Japan. This RSB-800 features a natural finish, maple multi-ply neck-thru construction with ash body wings and a two Aria pickups with active electronics. The bass is in good condition with dents and dings around the body, and lacquer bubbling up around the fretboard edges. Even after a cleaning, the posts are still a bit scratchy and should be replaced. It's sold in as-is vintage condition and includes a gigbag.

  • Ash Body
  • Neck-Thru Multi-Ply Maple Neck

  • 1.8" Nut Width
  • Active Electronics
  • 10 lbs, 10 oz.
  • .870" Neck Thickness at 1st Fret
  • 1.00" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes Gigbag

item.title: 1981 Aria Pro II SB-R80 Red — $949
item.description:
$949 · Very Good · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage 1981 Aria Pro II SB-R80 four-string bass built in Japan. This SB-R80 features a red stain finish, maple multi-ply neck-thru construction with ash body wings and a two Aria pickups with active electronics.This bass is in overall very good condition with just light dents and dings around the body, some of which are down to the wood. The output jack is cracking intermittently even after a thorough cleaning. A gigbag is included.

  • Ash Body
  • Neck-Thru Multi-Ply Maple Neck
  • 34" Scale Length
  • 1-11/16" Nut Width

  • 1.00" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes: Gigbag

item.title: 1982 Aria Pro II SB-600 Set Neck Natural — $949
item.description:
$949 · Very Good · The Music Zoo

This is a vintage 1982 Aria Pro II SB-600 four-string bass built in Japan. This SB-600 features a natural finish, maple multi-ply neck-thru construction with ash body wings and a single Aria pickup with heavy-duty brass hardware. This bass is in overall very good condition with just light dents and dings around the body. The mini switch is slightly bent but still works and the pickup is missing one height-adjustment screw. A gigbag is included.

  • Ash Body
  • Neck-Thru Multi-Ply Maple Neck

  • .990" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes Gigbag

item.title: Used Warwick Idolmaker 5 string bass w/bag — $729
item.description:
$729 · Good · Tone Tailors

The Warwick Idolmaker 5-string is a unique, offset-waist bass originating from a collaboration with icon Stevie Salas and Framus. It features a carved mahogany body, a 34" scale laminated maple neck, passive MEC Vintage Soapbar pickups, and active 2-band electronics

overall good condition

comes with a gig bag

Thank you for visiting our Reverb shop. Feel free to contact the shop directly for more information and deals!

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Money Bass 2007 ( Guitar Of The Week ) SEE VIDEO! — $1,095
item.description:
$1,095 · Fair · The Gear Garage - Canada

Bass plays great as shown in video

Pretty collectible considering only 400 of these were made.

It has lots of wear but sounds great in my opinion.

Original Gibson case has seen better days but it's functional.

Being sold as is but I think someone will be getting a great sounding bass that will cover lots of sounds.



Retailers previous info on it:


Part of the Gibson "Guitar of the Week" program, only 400 total made of this limited run Les Paul Money Bass guitar. Gibson's popular double-cutaway design with AA maple top brings a new level of playability and styling to the Gibson bass family, while the Les Paul name adds the rich tradition of the all-time favorite electric guitar. And with such a limited number available, you should order your Money Bass today!

Gibson Les Paul Money Bass Features:

  • Body Top Species: AA maple top
  • Back Species: Mahogany
  • Finish: Midnight Manhattan
  • Binding: Single-ply top
  • Neck Species: Mahogany
  • Profile: Rounded Bass
  • Neck Joint Location: 16
  • Fingerboard Species: Rosewood
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Nut Width: 15/8"
  • Inlays: Dot
  • Hardware Plating Finish: Chrome
  • Bridge: Adjustable brass
  • Knobs: Black Top Hat
  • Tuners: Grover
  • Pickups: Two TB Plus ceramic humbuckers
  • Controls: Two volume, one tone
  • Case Interior: Charcoal Grey Plush
  • Case Exterior: Black Hardshell
  • Case Silkscreen: Silver 'Gibson USA' logo

item.title: Mitchell EZB Super Short-Scale Acoustic-Electric Bass 3-Color Sunburst - Blemish — $99.95
item.description:
$99.95 · Fair · Andrew's Gear Outlet

This Mitchell Bass had a snapped headstock but is now splined and repaired, also with a working preamp

item.title: SX Vintage Series Sunburst — $275
item.description:
$275 · Good · Michael's Gear

Minor scratches on the back of the bass.
Sounds good.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003AC Al Cisneros Signature 2019 - 2020 Natural — $3,506
item.description:
$3,506 · Excellent · Reverb + Palen Music - Overland Park Co-Op

Rickenbacker 4003AC Al Cisneros Signature 2019 - 2020 - Natural

If you are looking to summon the heavy, mesmerizing walls of sound associated with stoner rock and doom metal legends, look no further. The Rickenbacker 4003AC Al Cisneros Signature bass is a beautifully crafted beast, born from a collaboration with the iconic bassist and vocalist of Sleep and OM. This limited-edition powerhouse swaps out traditional appointments for a custom-tailored layout engineered specifically to lay down thick, earth-shaking grooves with precise, modern reliability.

At its core, this bass is built on a neck-through-body design featuring a punchy, warm walnut body paired with a rock-solid maple neck and a bound maple fretboard. But what really sets this model apart is its unique pickup configuration. Instead of the standard bass/treble layout, Rickenbacker loaded it with two hot-wound treble single-coil pickups, shifting the neck pickup slightly closer to the bridge. Combined with an added removable thumb rest, it gives you an incredibly focused, aggressive midrange cut that preserves the legendary Rickenbacker chime while injecting a massive dose of heavy low-end power.

From its striking green "Sleep" triangle fretboard inlays down to its newly re-engineered bridge and tailpiece—which finally grant players effortless control over individual saddle height and intonation—this bass is a masterclass in artist-driven design. The classic oil finish highlights the gorgeous natural grain of the wood, making it look every bit as organic and powerful as it sounds. Whether you are following the smoke toward the riff filled land or carving your own path, this rare piece of Rickenbacker legacy is ready to hold down the low end.

Why Buy A Guitar From Palen Music Center?

Palen Music Center has a wide range of unique guitars to enhance the sound of your music! We have been trusted by musicians across the country since 1963 and are constantly working to provide the best value for our customers. With the addition of our new PLEK machine and our longtime veteran luthiers, we are pleased to provide top-quality guitar repair.


Highlights


  • Limited-Edition Legacy: An exclusive artist collaboration with doom metal icon Al Cisneros (Sleep, OM), limited to a rare run of only 420 pieces worldwide.
  • Dual Hot-Wound Single Coils: Swaps the traditional layout for a pair of hot-wound treble pickups to maximize punch, bite, and aggressive midrange clarity.
  • Re-Engineered Bridge System: Features an updated, modern RIC tailpiece and bridge layout that offers individual saddle adjustment for perfect intonation.
  • Signature Aesthetics: Beautifully adorned with custom green "Sleep" triangle fingerboard inlays and a specialized Al Cisneros signature pickguard.
  • Premium Natural Tonewoods: Built with rich walnut body wings and a through-body maple neck finished in a smooth natural oil to maximize resonance and sustain.

Specifications

  • Body Wood: Walnut
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Left/Right Handed: Right-Handed
  • Fretboard Wood: Maple (Bound)
  • Scale Length: 33.25"
  • Fretboard Radius: 10"
  • Fretboard Inlay/Material: Green "Sleep" Triangles
  • Neck Profile: Traditional 4003
  • Finish: Natural Oil
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Tuners: Schaller Deluxe
  • Neck Pickup: Hot-Wound Treble Single-Coil with Bezel
  • Bridge Pickup: Hot-Wound Treble Single-Coil with Bezel
  • Electronics: 2 x Volume, 2 x Tone, 3-Way Toggle Pickup Selector (Mono Output)
  • Bridge: RIC Re-Engineered Tailpiece and Bridge
  • Manufacturer Part Number: 4003AC
  • Depth at 1st Fret: .891"
  • Depth at 12th Fret: .913"

Condition: Excellent. Light wear typical of a gently used instrument. Light surface scratches, scuffs, etc.

The instrument pictured is the exact instrument you’ll receive. All fretted instruments receive a free complimentary professional setup.

This item includes everything pictured.

Please feel free to reach out to our knowledgeable sales staff with any additional questions!

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - Present Olympic White — $1,109
item.description:
$1,109 · Very Good · Reverb + Palen Music - Overland Park Co-Op

Fender American Professional II Precision Bass - Olympic White

The Fender American Professional II Precision Bass draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration, and evolution to meet the demands of today's working bassist. Built around a classic alder body, this bass delivers the balanced, punchy low-end foundation that has anchored countless hit records across every genre imaginable. From the iconic Motown grooves of James Jamerson and Bob Babbitt to rock legends and modern session aces, the P Bass legacy is unmatched. Wrapped in a timeless Olympic White finish, this instrument brings that legendary heritage straight into the modern era.

At the heart of this powerhouse is the V-Mod II Precision Bass split-coil pickup. This updated design is more articulate than ever before, serving up the signature thump, growl, and mid-range cut the P Bass is famous for, while effortlessly eliminating single-coil hum. Combined with a premium rosewood fretboard that adds a touch of organic warmth and smooth articulation to your notes, this bass offers incredible sonic versatility that feels instantly familiar.

Fender didn't just stop at great tone—playability gets a massive upgrade here. The classic 1963 "C" neck profile is enhanced with incredibly smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin neck finish, and a newly sculpted neck heel. This gives you supreme hand comfort and seamless access to the upper frets. Paired with a versatile HiMass Vintage bridge for maximum sustain and rock-solid tuning stability, this American Professional II Precision Bass is a true workhorse ready to hold down the groove on any stage or studio track.

Why Buy A Guitar From Palen Music Center?

Palen Music Center has a wide range of unique guitars to enhance the sound of your music! We have been trusted by musicians across the country since 1963 and are constantly working to provide the best value for our customers. With the addition of our new PLEK machine and our longtime veteran luthiers, we are pleased to provide top-quality guitar repair.


Highlights


  • Classic alder body paired with a gorgeous Olympic White finish for timeless style and a balanced sonic foundation
  • Upgraded V-Mod II split-coil pickup delivers legendary Precision punch and growl with enhanced clarity
  • Ultra-comfortable 1963 "C" neck profile featuring rolled fingerboard edges and a silky "Super-Natural" satin finish
  • Warm rosewood fretboard and sculpted neck heel offer effortless playability all the way up the register
  • 4-Saddle HiMass Vintage bridge ensures exceptional sustain and flexible top-load or string-through stringing options

Specifications

  • Body Wood: Alder
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Left/Right Handed: Right-Handed
  • Fretboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Fretboard Radius: 9.5"
  • Fretboard Inlay/Material: White Dot
  • Neck Profile: 1963 "C"
  • Finish: Gloss Urethane (Body), "Super-Natural" Satin Urethane (Neck Back)
  • Hardware: Nickel/Chrome
  • Tuners: Fender Lightweight Vintage-Style Keys with Tapered Shafts
  • Strings: Flats
  • Middle Pickup: V-Mod II Split Single-Coil Precision Bass
  • Electronics: Master Volume, Master Tone
  • Bridge: 4-Saddle HiMass Vintage (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)
  • Manufacturer Part Number: 0193930705
  • Depth at 1st Fret: .801"
  • Depth at 12th Fret: .981"

item.title: Sterling StingRay Bass 2020s - Candy Apple Red — $325
item.description:
$325 · Excellent · 115th Dream Guitars

Up for sale is a Sterling By Music Man StingRay Bass in candy apple red. The Ray 4HH model features two bass humbuckers and a 5-way switch for crazy versatility. This thing rips! I definitely hate to part with it, but I’ve reached the conclusion that I’m a guitar player and not a bass player. Oh well, my loss is your gain. It includes a new hardshell case. Local pickup only.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-4 FL Left Hand Bass Guitar - Honey Satin (2765) — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Brand New · Musician Madness

Specs

General Model Name Stiletto Studio-4 FL LH Item Number 2765 Guitar Color Shown Honey Satin Neck Tuners Schecter Fretboard Material Rosewood Neck Material Maple/Walnut Multi-ply Inlays Lined Fretless Scale 34" (864 MM) Neck Shape Thin "C" Thickness 1st Fret- .787" (20MM), 12th Fret- .866" (22MM) Frets Fretless Fretboard Radius 16" (406MM) Nut Graph Tech XL Black Tusq Nut Width 1.496" (38 MM) Truss Rod 2-Way Adjustable Rod w/ 5/32" (4mm) Allen Nut Body Guitar Colors Honey Satin Hardware Color Satin Gold Top Contour Flat Top Dexterity Left Handed Construction Neck-Thru w/Ultra Access Body Material Mahogany Top Material Bubinga Bridge Diamond Custom Bass Electronics Controls Master Volume/Blend/3-Band EMG Active E/Q Bridge Pickup EMG 35HZ Neck Pickup EMG 35HZ Battery Compartment 18-volt w/Screw Plate Accessories Knobs Metal Knurled w/ Set Screw Strings Ernie Ball 4 String Flatwound #2808 Case (Sold Separately)
